title: Clompanus thwaitesii
taxonomy: Clompanus thwaitesii is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It belongs to the genus Clompanus. The plant is native to Sri Lanka and is an epiphytic species, meaning it grows on other plants. The classification of Clompanus thwaitesii is still evolving, and further research may be needed to confirm its precise taxonomic status. It is considered a rare and unique species within the Gesneriaceae family.
